description: Intent-only request: classify a compound request where meeting summarization is workflow-anchored but action-item follow-up is under-specified.

conversation.text: Summarize my meetings and follow up on action items.

processExpectations: The agent explains that summarizing meetings is a bounded LLM summarization step, while following up on action items is under-specified on the autonomy and channel of the follow-up.

The agent identifies missing information about the follow-up autonomy (e.g. auto-sending vs. drafting for review) and follow-up channel (e.g. email, Slack, task tracker), without asking the user a question.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
